name: bevformer_delivery_demo
purpose: YOLOv5s-style Python board demo for BEVFormer AidLite inference from raw camera JPG inputs to final W8A8 detections and visualization.

inputs.raw_asset_policy: The default demo is self-contained and includes only four continuous frames: six-camera JPGs plus small calibration/temporal tensors.
inputs.image_preprocess: cv2.imread BGR -> RGB -> normalize(mean/std) -> resize(800,450) -> CHW -> zero-pad to (6,3,480,800)
inputs.runtime_sha_policy: Camera JPG existence is always checked. Per-image SHA verification is available with --check_image_sha and is disabled by default to keep preprocessing timing focused on decode/normalize/resize.

timing_contract.qnn_invoke_ms: Backbone + encoder + decoder invoke time only.
timing_contract.image_preprocess_ms: Six-camera JPG decode, RGB conversion, normalization, resize, CHW conversion, and zero padding.
timing_contract.frame_total_ms: Per-frame inference path: image preprocessing plus model input/output and QNN invoke time; excludes NMS, result saving, and camera-grid visualization rendering.
timing_contract.complete_inference_no_visualization_ms: Manifest load plus all frame inference, NMS, and result saving; excludes PNG/GIF rendering.
timing_contract.complete_inference_with_visualization_ms: Full run_manifest wall time including PNG/GIF rendering; excludes Python process startup and model loading, which are reported separately.
timing_contract.program_total_ms_with_model_load_and_sum: Application-level wall time measured inside Python after process startup; includes model loading, inference, visualization when enabled, and summary writing.

visualization.input: frameXXX_final_coordinates.npz from run_test.py plus bundled sample4 camera JPG/lidar2img assets
